## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss AI applications in marketing with Marcel Santilli, Founder & CEO of GrowthX, to help the team leverage AI more effectively in their jobs and workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Becoming "AI native" requires dedicated time (100-1000 hours) to deeply explore and experiment with AI tools and applications](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [First principles thinking and strong writing skills are crucial for effectively leveraging AI](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [AI should elevate human thinking and collaboration, not replace it or make it lazy](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Decomposing tasks and providing clear context/examples are key for getting quality AI outputs](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)

## Topics

### Becoming AI Native

  - [Carve out significant time (e.g. 2 weeks) to go deep on AI exploration](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Apply AI to real work tasks that matter to you to learn through practical application](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Experiment constantly, testing different prompts and approaches](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [Audit your calendar and activities to identify areas for AI optimization](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

### Effective AI Delegation

  - [Process of delegating to AI is similar to delegating to humans](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Can't delegate what you don't understand yourself](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Provide clear context, examples, and instructions](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Show good/bad examples to calibrate AI outputs](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)

### First Principles Thinking

  - [Break problems down to fundamental components](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=419.0)
  - [Example: For audience research, imagine a day/year in target persona's life](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [Helps generate deeper insights AI can build upon](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)

### Writing Skills

  - [Strong writing organizes thoughts and improves AI collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Study and emulate different writing styles to develop your own](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Use AI to polish and iterate on human-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=659.0)

### AI for Content Creation

  - [Use AI to generate editorial concepts, outlines, and drafts](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Provide style examples and "polishing instructions" to refine AI outputs](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Combine multiple AI tools/models for best results (e.g. concept generation + image search + layout tools)](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)

### AI for Image Generation

  - [Current tools have limitations, especially with brand consistency](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2410.0)
  - [Break down image creation into components (concepts, styles, layouts)](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2438.0)
  - [Use AI to generate/select concepts, then human design for final polish](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2492.0)
  - [Tools like Add to Sale allow programmatic image creation with variable inputs](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)

### Staying Up-to-Date on AI

  - [Use AI to summarize long-form content (podcasts, articles, books)](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2394.0)
  - [Extract key frameworks, mental models, and takeaways](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2419.0)
  - [Experiment with different summarization approaches as a learning exercise](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2431.0)

## Next Steps

  - Team members to identify tedious/annoying daily tasks that could potentially be automated with AI
  - [Explore carving out dedicated time for deep AI experimentation and learning](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Try using AI to summarize and extract insights from work-related content](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2394.0)
  - [Experiment with AI-assisted content creation, starting with writing/editing tasks](https://fathom.video/share/y5fMyU6KPCHizWZt6M-v4-t7HAUWs1nZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2622.0)
